title: Batman
boundary_reason: Julius Schwartz's first Batman issue was #164 after the Detective Comics #327 New Look launch.
notes: Stored as title-level Batman era boundary rather than industry-age boundary.

title: Detective Comics
boundary_reason: Detective Comics #327 premiered the New Look Batman direction under Julius Schwartz.
notes: Useful future boundary for Silver/New Look mapping.

title: Batman
boundary_reason: Dick Grayson leaves for college and Bruce Wayne leaves Wayne Manor in Batman #217, immediately before the O'Neil/Adams Detective #395 tonal shift.
notes: Defensible Library Batman-specific boundary; not claimed as universal consensus.

title: Detective Comics
boundary_reason: Detective Comics #395 is the first O'Neil/Adams darker Batman story often cited as signaling the Bronze Age Batman turn; #567 is the final pre-Modern local Detective issue in the current convention.
notes: Ends before Detective #568, which is used as the Modern local Detective start.

title: The Brave and the Bold
boundary_reason: The Brave and the Bold became exclusively a Batman team-up title from #74 through its final issue #200; Bronze report treats #74-200 as the useful Batman-led physical run.
notes: Start predates broad industry Bronze, so industry_age per issue remains approximate.

title: World's Finest Comics
boundary_reason: World's Finest contains relevant Batman/Superman material but needs issue-level Batman relevance audit before a required scope is created.
notes: Kept as boundary backlog, not counted in Bronze core completion.

title: Batman Family
boundary_reason: Batman Family ran #1-20 as a Bat-family anthology and then merged into Detective Comics #481-495 as a feature format.
notes: Physical run target even when content includes reprints.

title: Batman and the Outsiders
boundary_reason: Batman-led Outsiders title ran #1-32; after Batman left, the title changed to Adventures of the Outsiders with #33.
notes: Collector target stops at Batman-led run.

title: Batman
boundary_reason: Batman #404 begins Year One, the existing Library Modern local Batman range.

title: Detective Comics
boundary_reason: Detective Comics #568 is the existing Library Modern local Detective start after the pre-Crisis/Bronze boundary.
notes: Existing range retained; exact post-Crisis transition can be refined later.
